author: WSvX
content:
## Handoff: Per-Widget Calendar Filtering

**Status**: Implementation complete (all 12 files committed). Pending build verification and manual testing.

---

## Session History

### Session 1 (2026-04-22): Design Review Cycle

Design review cycle completed. All 12 findings dispositioned.

**Deliverables:**
- Design doc: .agent-workspace/docs/2026-04-22-per-widget-calendar-filter-design.md — Reviewed, Ready for Implementation
- Review doc: .agent-workspace/docs/2026-04-22-per-widget-calendar-filter-review.md — all 12 findings resolved

**Key decisions:**
- B1: Monthly widget deferred to follow-up PR
- M1: Nullable calendars TEXT DEFAULT NULL column
- M3: Re-configuration fix bundled in same PR
- M4: getCalendarIdsAsList() helper on Widget model
- m3: Widget selection wins over global filter

### Session 2 (2026-04-23): Foundation Layer

- Commit b8cebd501 — feat(widget): add calendars column and helpers to Widget model
  - models/Widget.kt: calendars: String? = null, isCalendarsConfigured(), getCalendarIdsAsList()
  - databases/EventsDatabase.kt: Version 11->12, MIGRATION_11_12
  - helpers/Constants.kt: EVENT_LIST_CALENDARS
- Commit 1bb0fd97 — feat(widget): add settings icon drawable and calendar picker strings

### Session 3 (2026-04-23): Design Triage + Core Implementation

Crosslink triage (issue #14): All 8 design gaps accepted (G1-G8).
Closed crosslink issues #2, #3, #4, #10, #13.

- Commit 838d5aa9b — feat(widget): implement per-widget calendar filtering for event list widget (6 files)
- Commit 1d19b476d — chore: add Room schema 12.json

### Session 4 (2026-04-24): Calendar Picker Pre-selection Fix

- Commit 247ec9bca — fix(widget): pre-check all calendars when default selection is used

---

## All Files Committed (12/12)

| File | Commit |
|------|--------|
| models/Widget.kt | b8cebd501 |
| databases/EventsDatabase.kt | b8cebd501 |
| helpers/Constants.kt | b8cebd501 |
| helpers/EventsHelper.kt | 838d5aa9b |
| helpers/MyWidgetListProvider.kt | 838d5aa9b |
| adapters/EventListWidgetAdapter.kt | 838d5aa9b |
| activities/WidgetListConfigureActivity.kt | 838d5aa9b, 247ec9bca |
| res/layout/widget_event_list_header.xml | 838d5aa9b |
| res/layout/widget_config_list.xml | 838d5aa9b |
| res/drawable/ic_settings_vector.xml | 1bb0fd97 |
| res/values/strings.xml | 1bb0fd97 |
| Room schema 12.json | 1d19b476d |

## Key Constraints

- Event list widget only. No monthly widget changes (deferred to follow-up).
- Nullable column: String? DEFAULT NULL. All reads via getCalendarIdsAsList().
- Widget selection wins completely: overrideCalendarIds non-null -> skip ALL global filter logic.
- Re-configuration fix bundled. Back press guarded, save disabled until loaded.
- Settings gear icon on widget header via direct PendingIntent.getActivity().
- No LAST_USED_WIDGET_CALENDARS constant (removed, add back in follow-up).

## Next Steps

1. Verify build: ./gradlew assembleCoreDebug
2. Close crosslink #11 (Room schema committed) and #1 (parent)
3. Manual testing per design doc section 5.5
4. Final verification: lint + build, migration, backward compat
